title: AI-SDLC DispatchSession
description: Per-task session file written by /ai-sdlc execute-parallel to .ai-sdlc/dispatch/sessions/<task-id-lower>.session.json. Tracks the tmux pane lifecycle and heartbeat state for a single concurrently-running /ai-sdlc execute invocation. Updated by the spawned session after each Step 0-13 transition. AISDLC-462.

schemaVersion.description: Session schema version. Pinned so future readers can refuse sessions they don't understand.

taskId.description: Stable backlog task identifier in canonical uppercase form (e.g. 'AISDLC-453'). Pattern mirrors the validate_task_id shell regex in execute-parallel.md — no drift between schema and shell (AISDLC-464).

tmuxSession.description: Name of the tmux session hosting all parallel panes (e.g. 'ai-sdlc-parallel').

tmuxWindow.description: Name of the tmux window for this task's pane (e.g. 'exec-aisdlc-453').

paneId.description: tmux pane ID (e.g. '%14'). Empty string when pane ID is not yet known (at initial reservation time).

spawnedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the tmux window was created.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the session. 'starting' = tmux window spawned, claude not yet running. 'in-progress' = first heartbeat received. 'done' = /ai-sdlc execute reported success + prUrl set. 'failed' = /ai-sdlc execute exited non-zero, was killed, or heartbeat became stale (reaped by session-reaper). 'cancelled' = session received and honored a cancel control signal (AISDLC-481).

currentStep.description: Most recent Step 0-13 name written by the heartbeat helper (e.g. '07-reviewers-running', 'done'). Absent until first heartbeat.

lastHeartbeat.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent step transition written by the spawned session. Absent until first heartbeat.

prUrl.description: GitHub PR URL set when status reaches 'done'. Null or absent while the session is still running.

prNumber.description: GitHub PR number (integer) corresponding to prUrl. Null or absent while the session is still running.
